calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

BEN HAMBURG, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs BART SEIDLER, TRUSTEE OF THE BART SEIDLER

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) CALVIN TRAN for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,523.00
Prejudgment Interest - $4479.57
Attorney's Fees - $6460.00
Costs - $355.00
Total judgment in the amount of $58,817.57

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Apr-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
